calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners, Everardo Cabrera and Consepcion Santiago, were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the Minor, Liliana Monroy Cruz.
Petitioners were placed under oath and testified.
Mario Rivera was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Liliana Monroy Cruz.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Off Calendar
